requiredBehaviors.behavior: Project onboarding is shown per project until the project is complete, the seen-count limit is reached, or demo mode suppresses it.
Completed project onboarding is persisted under the resolved project root without marking unrelated projects complete.
The project step sequence preserves the donor workspace/instructions shape with AgenC-branded AGENC.md instructions.
Persisted onboarding state recovers from malformed JSON and hostile value shapes before making display decisions.

intentionalReductions: AgenC persists project onboarding state in onboarding.json under the AgenC home instead of donor project config.
AgenC detects AGENC.md only; donor-specific instruction filenames are not carried.
AgenC keeps shouldShowProjectOnboarding uncached so tests and live callers observe current per-project persisted state.
